description: After using the last spare motor in stock, a technician needs to order a replacement to replenish the inventory.

nodes.task_description: Identify the part number and supplier for the motor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct part and supplier information.

nodes.task_description: Create a purchase requisition for the motor, specifying the reorder quantity.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a purchase requisition for approval by the maintenance manager.

nodes.task_description: Submit the requisition to the purchasing department.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully submits the request into the procurement workflow.
